courseTitle: Game Feel, UI, Audio, and Visual Communication
title: Menu as Game
genericDescription: Treat menu navigation as interaction design; build settings and progression screens; reduce friction before play.
specificDescription: Build a game where the front end, options, level select, or inventory screen includes meaningful interaction. Include keyboard/gamepad or equivalent non-pointer navigation.
gradingRubric: 30 pts interface usability; 20 pts menu-game integration; 20 pts options completeness; 15 pts input support; 15 pts documentation.
